memoryArtifacts.description: Yolande de Bourgogne, née en décembre 1247, morte le 2 juin 1280, comtesse de Nevers de 1262 à 1280, fille d'Eudes de Bourgogne, comte de Nevers, d'Auxerre et de Tonnerre et de Mathilde II de Bourbon. …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers於1247年12月出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達迪喬時，她的父親Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers17歲，母親Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers13歲。她於1266年與Jean Tristan de France結婚。她去世於1280年6月2日在法國布格享年32歲，埋葬在法國o-阿爾培斯o內維斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers于1247年12月出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達迪喬时，她的父亲Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers17岁，母亲Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers13岁。她于1266年与Jean Tristan de France结婚。她去世于1280年6月2日在法国布格享年32岁，埋葬在法国o-阿爾培斯o內維斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Yolande
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Yolanda
meanings: Of uncertain origin. It is found in Old French as Yolande , of which this is a Latinate form. It may be ultimately of Germanic origin, but if so it has been altered beyond recognition. It is also sometimes identified with the name of St Jolenta ( d. 1298 ), daughter of the king of Hungary.

en.lifeSummary: When Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers was born in December 1247, in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, her father, Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers, was 17 and her mother, Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers, was 13. She married Jean Tristan de France in 1266. She died on 2 June 1280, in Burgundy, France, at the age of 32, and was buried in Nevers, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers est née en décembre 1247, à Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Jean Tristan de France en 1266. Elle est décédée le 2 juin 1280, à Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterrée à Nevers, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers im Dezember 1247 in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers 17 und ihre Mutter Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers 13. Sie hat 1266 Jean Tristan de France geheiratet. Sie starb am 2. Juni 1280 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Burgund, Frankreich und wurde in Nevers, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers è nata il nel dicembre 1247 nel Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, sua padre, Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Jean Tristan de France nel 1266. Morì il 2 giugno 1280, nel Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolta a Nevers, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Yolande de Bourgogne II of Neversが1247年12月にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeクoテ-ド'オルディジョンで生まれた時，父Odo of Burgundy Count of Neversは17歳，母Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Neversは13歳であった。1266年にJean Tristan de Franceと結婚した。彼女は1280年6月2日にフランスボウルゴグンで32歳で死去し，フランスルhoネ-アルペスルhoンネバーズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers(이)가 1247년 12월 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 디조에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1266년 Jean Tristan de France(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1280년 6월 2일 프랑스 부르고그니에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 ho니-알프스 ho니 네버스에 묻혔다.

mn.december 1247–2 June 1280: 1247 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сар–1280 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 2

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers nasceu em dezembro de 1247, em Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean Tristan de France em 1266. Ela faleceu em 2 de junho de 1280, em Bourgogne, França, com 32 anos, e foi sepultada em Nevers, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers родилась декабрь 1247 г. в местности диджон, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, её отцу по имени Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean Tristan de France в 1266 г. Она умерла 2 июня 1280 г. в местности бургогн, Франция в возрасте 32 лет и была похоронена в местности нивирс, рoн, рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Yolande de Bourgogne II of Nevers nació en diciembre de 1247, en Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Jean Tristan de France en 1266. Murió el 2 de junio de 1280, en Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultada en Nevers, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
